name: COA-7966 Daily Plan lesson opens and returns
description: Starts from the progress-dependent Daily Plan, opens the first available Daily Lesson when the current program day exposes one, verifies content, and returns to Daily Plan.
descriptionHtml: Starts from the progress-dependent Daily Plan, opens the first available Daily Lesson when the current program day exposes one, verifies content, and returns to Daily Plan.
statusMessage: Current existing-progress Daily Plan state does not expose Daily Lessons; lesson-opening coverage needs a day/program fixture with a visible lesson.
